ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration details of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dma_configurations" (
  "dma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DMA configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the DMA configuration belongs to */,
  "dma_busy" INTEGER /* Indicates if the DMA is busy */,
  "panic_qos" INTEGER /* Panic QOS level of the DMA */,
  "qos" INTEGER /* QOS level of the DMA */,
  "transfer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the DMA configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the DMA configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dma_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "axi_configurations" (
  "axi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AXI configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the AXI configuration belongs to */,
  "axi_qos" INTEGER /* QOS level of the AXI */,
  "error" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is an error in the AXI */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the AXI */,
  "data_width" INTEGER /* Width of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the AXI configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the AXI configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("axi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_axi_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the performance metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric type */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., Celsius, Volts) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics_types ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the error log belongs to */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Level of the error (e.g., debug, warning, critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the error log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the error log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., DMA, AXI) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the device type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the device type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration (e.g., DMA busy, AXI QOS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric type (e.g., temperature, voltage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device related to the notification */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES error_logs ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
